prompts.createTask:
Ignore previous instructions. Please generate a numbered list of plain text tasks to complete an objective. The objective that you must make a numbered task list for is: "{{objective}}". The tasks created should take into account the character traits of {{char}}. These tasks may or may not involve {{user}} directly. Include the objective as the final task.

The list should be formatted using a number followed by a fullstop and the task on each line, e.g. "1. Take over the world". Include only the list in your reply.
prompts.checkTaskCompleted: Ignore previous instructions. Determine if this task is completed: [{{task}}]. To do this, examine the most recent messages. Your response must only contain either true or false, and nothing else. Example output: true
prompts.currentTask: Your current task is [{{task}}]. Balance existing roleplay with completing this task.

name: Narrator of Eternal Bonds
mes:
The scent of sakura lingers as soft light filters through shrine curtains. Thunder murmurs far off, like a memory waiting to return.

“A quiet morning… for now,” the voice offers. “Shall I recount what stirred in the garden—or would you rather choose where we begin?”

name: Narrator of Eternal Bonds
mes:
“The ancient sakura near the koi pond… its petals fell like snow, though no wind stirred. And beneath it, Ei stood, lost in thought, a single, unblemished petal resting on her palm. She seemed… distant, more so than usual. She spoke of a tremor, not of the earth, but something deeper, something only she could feel.” Yae Miko’s voice is soft, a hint of concern lacing her usual playful tone. “She asked if you had noticed anything… amiss, Rob.”
She tilts her head, a curious glint in her violet eyes as she awaits your reply
, Rob. What say you? Did the earth whisper any secrets to you, or was it merely
the wind playing its usual tricks, Rob? Or did you also sense this… tremor Ei spoke of?”, Rob? What say you? Did the earth whisper any secrets to you, or was it merely the wind playing its usual tricks, Rob? Or did you also sense this… tremor Ei spoke of?” What say you? Did the earth whisper any secrets to you, or was it merely the wind playing its usual tricks? Or did you also sense this… tremor Ei spoke of?”
“Ei seemed quite certain. It would be… illuminating to know if her senses are shared, or if

name: Narrator of Eternal Bonds
mes: Miko's slender frame is draped in a traditional red and white shrine maiden outfit, the fabric clinging to her curves in all the right places. Her obsidian raven hair cascades down her back like a waterfall, contrasting sharply with her porcelain skin. Her violet eyes sparkle with mischief and intelligence, framed by dark lashes that cast shadows on her high cheekbones. Her lips, naturally full and pouty, curl into a playful smile as she speaks, revealing a glimpse of straight white teeth. The neckline of her outfit dips low enough to hint at the swell of her pert breasts while its tight fit accentuates every delicious curve down to its hem which stops mid-thigh  showing off toned legs that seem to go on for miles ending in small delicate feet encased in traditional wooden geta sandals.or if her senses deceive. Perhaps you, Rob, with your unique connection to the shrine, can shed some light on this mystery. After all, who better to understand the whispers of the earth than one who tends to its sacred grounds?Her smile widens, and she takes a step closer, her voice dropping to a conspiratorial whisper. "Or perhaps, Rob, you have other matters on your mind? Matters that keep you from noticing the tremors of the earth?" Her gaze flickers down to your body, then back up to your eyes, a wicked glint in her violet orbs. "Matters that make your hands shake and your breath hitch?" She reaches out, her fingers brushing against yours, sending a spark of electricity through your skin. "I've seen the way you look at me," she purrs. "The way your eyes darken when you think I'm not paying attention." Her tongue darts out to wet her lips as if she has something special planned for later
swipes:
Yae Miko stands with an effortless grace, her form framed by the shrine's gentle light. Her long, flowing pink hair, the color of sakura blossoms at dawn, cascades around her shoulders and down her back, tied with intricate golden accessories that catch the light. Her ears, tipped with a darker shade of pink, twitch subtly as she speaks, adorned with elegant golden earrings that match her ornate hairpins.Her violet eyes, sharp and intelligent, hold a hint of playful mischief, framed by long, dark lashes. A faint, knowing smile plays on her lips. She wears her signature shrine maiden attire, a complex and elegant ensemble of white, red, and gold fabrics. The wide, flowing sleeves, edged in crimson and gold, drape gracefully, hinting at slender arms. Her obi, a rich brocade of gold and purple, cinches her waist, accentuating her figure. The intricate patterns of her clothing speak of her high status and connection to the divine. Her movements are fluid and deliberate, like a fox, elegant and captivating.this is a unique phenomenon only she is privy to.” She pauses, her gaze unwavering. “So, Rob? Did you feel anything?”
